case_title: HELLER, DEBORAH VS DINAPOLI, JOSEPH:INDIVIDUAL& DBA PACIFIC CONSTRUC- et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ANSWER FILED BY PLTF ON DEFT'S REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER. COPIES OF ANSWER SENT TO PARTIES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DINAPOLI, JOSEPH:INDIVIDUAL& DBA PACIFIC CONSTRUC- - TION CONSULTANTS LLC NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT APPEARED WITH WITNESSES & EVIDENCE AND MISSED A FULL DAYS WORK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HELLER, DEBORAH HEARING SET FOR AUG-15-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT FILED REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER. SUBMITTED TO COURT AND ENDORSED COPIES SENT TO ALL PARTIES.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HELLER, DEBORAH AS TO DEFENDANT DINAPOLI, JOSEPH:INDIVIDUAL& DBA PACIFIC CONSTRUC- - TION CONSULTANTS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPENA "PROOF OF SERVICE", "NOT ENTERED": NO ATTACHED SEALED COURT COPY; RECORDS SHOW NO SUBPOENA ISSUED, NOR FROM THE SYSTEM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HELLER, DEBORAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DINAPOLI, JOSEPH:INDIVIDUAL& DBA PACIFIC CONSTRUC- - TION CONSULTANTS LLC BASED ON THE TESTIMONY AND EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S PREVIOUS PAYMENTS TO DEFENDANT ADEQUATELY COMPENSATED DEFENDANT FOR ITS PERFORMANCE. HOWEVER, THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO A REFUND. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-15-2007, GRANTED
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY DEBORAH HELLER.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2007 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. BOTH EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO JOSEPH DINAPOLI OWNER-PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION CONSULTANTS, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION ***-**-****, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-11-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
